basic_details.job_title: NIT Uttarakhand Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand (NIT Uttarakhand) Temporary Faculty Notification 2026 has been released on 02 June 2026 on the official website of NIT Uttarakhand. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the NIT Uttarakhand Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or CGPA 6.5/10) at both UG and PG levels from recognized Universities/Institutes.
qualification.details: Ph.D. in relevant discipline with first class (60% marks or CGPA 6.5/10) at both UG and PG levels from recognized Universities/Institutes.

vacancy_details.Post Name: Temporary Faculty - Computer Science and Engineering (CSE)
Temporary Faculty - Humanities and Social Sciences (HSS)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of NIT Uttarakhand to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NIT Uttarakhand Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the NIT Uttarakhand Temporary Faculty recruitment is 29th June 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Temporary Faculty at NIT Uttarakhand?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for Temporary Faculty positions at NIT Uttarakhand, distributed across various departments.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for the Temporary Faculty positions?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Ph.D. in the relevant discipline with first-class marks (60% or CGPA 6.5/10) at both undergraduate and postgraduate levels.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for the NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Temporary Faculty posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an Interview and a 5-10 minute Presentation by the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is strictly online through the official NIT Uttarakhand website.

faq.question: Q8. Which departments are recruiting Temporary Faculty?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Temporary Faculty in Computer Science and Engineering (CSE), Electronics Engineering (ECE), Chemistry (CY), and Humanities and Social Sciences (HSS).

faq.question: Q9. What is the official website of NIT Uttarakhand?
faq.answer: The official website of the National Institute of Technology Uttarakhand is www.nituk.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. Are there any age relaxations mentioned for the NIT Uttarakhand recruitment?
faq.answer: The provided data does not specify any age limits or age relaxations. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for detailed information.
